Chinese Zodiac:  马 / Horse — 二〇二六年四月十五 丙午(马)年 癸巳(蛇)月 乙巳(蛇)日 丑(牛)时 纳音[天河水 长流水 覆灯火 涧下水] 星期日 东方青龙 星宿[房日兔](吉) 彭祖百忌[乙不栽植千株不长 巳不远行财物伏藏] 喜神方位[乾](西北) 阳贵神方位[坤](西南) 阴贵神方位[坎](正北) 福神方位[坤](西南) 财神方位[艮](东北) 冲[(己亥)猪] 煞[东]

Local Time: 2026-05-30 09:25 PDT (approx)
divination_used: The Tarot reveals 10 of Wands (reversed). Meaning: Numeric manifestation of Wands energy: stage 10. The I Ching casts Hexagram Sung / Conflict: Disputes, need to seek arbitration, stop half-way. Changing lines [1, 2, 5] transform it into Hexagram Kou / Coming to Meet. Geomancy cast shield. Mothers: Fortuna Minor, Laetitia, Carcer, Puella. Judge: Fortuna Major (Inner victory, light, supreme success, protection).

tarot.name: 10 of Wands
tarot.meaning: Numeric manifestation of Wands energy: stage 10
tarot.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 240 380" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="background:#0b132b; border-radius:16px;">
  <defs>
    <filter id="card-glow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="5" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <!-- Card Border -->
  <rect x="10" y="10" width="220" height="360" rx="12" fill="none" stroke="#ff00ff" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#card-glow)"/>

  <!-- Astrological/Hebrew Letter Indicators -->
  
  

  <!-- Central Archetypal Symbol Shape -->
  <circle cx="120" cy="180" r="45" fill="none" stroke="#ff00ff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,4"/>
  <polygon points="120,115 155,190 85,190" fill="none" stroke="#ff00ff" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#card-glow)"/>

  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="120" y="320" fill="#ffffff" font-size="14" font-family="sans-serif" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">10 of Wands</text>
  <text x="120" y="340" fill="#ff00ff" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1.5">REVERSED (FIRE)</text>
</svg>

iching.name: Sung / Conflict
iching.meaning: Disputes, need to seek arbitration, stop half-way
iching.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 400 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="background:#080e1a; border-radius:12px;">
  <defs>
    <filter id="hex-glow" filterUnits="userSpaceOnUse" x="0" y="0" width="400" height="200">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <!-- Titles -->
  <text x="100" y="20" fill="#ffffff" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">PRIMARY</text>
  <text x="300" y="20" fill="#ffffff" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">RELATING</text>

  <!-- Line Drawings -->
  <line x1="40" y1="35" x2="160" y2="35" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="7" />
  <line x1="40" y1="60" x2="160" y2="60" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="7" filter="url(#hex-glow)"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="60" r="4" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#hex-glow)"/>
  <line x1="40" y1="85" x2="160" y2="85" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="7" />

  <line x1="40" y1="135" x2="160" y2="135" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="7" filter="url(#hex-glow)"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="135" r="4" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#hex-glow)"/>
  <line x1="40" y1="160" x2="90" y2="160" stroke="#ff00ff" stroke-width="7" filter="url(#hex-glow)"/>
  <line x1="110" y1="160" x2="160" y2="160" stroke="#ff00ff" stroke-width="7" filter="url(#hex-glow)"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="160" r="4" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#hex-glow)"/>
  <line x1="240" y1="35" x2="360" y2="35" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="7"/>
  <line x1="240" y1="60" x2="360" y2="60" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="7"/>
  <line x1="240" y1="85" x2="360" y2="85" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="7"/>
  <line x1="240" y1="110" x2="360" y2="110" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="7"/>
  <line x1="240" y1="135" x2="360" y2="135" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="7"/>
  <line x1="240" y1="160" x2="290" y2="160" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="7"/>
  <line x1="310" y1="160" x2="360" y2="160" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="7"/>
</svg>
